title: Because, yeah, there's really nice hotels over.
content:
Because, yeah, there's really nice hotels over.

Oh, this is where the ship start to go.

No, the ship's over here.

Let's see.

I used to walk this whole thing all the way down to here , where it opens up and the ship's coming in and out of here.

So I would like, park by the..

Did you see the parking?

Like They have a parking lot for a parking.

I park over there and I do this whole little walk, and the water's, like crazy over here, because they have, you know, it's like manm and it has all rocks.

It's really, like it would move really quickly .

How come you never took a cruise out of there?

I'm surprised.

Yeah, because so many things come out of there, so many cruise ships go out in and out of there.

So they' broke for a nice theater.

Last night.

Last night.

Yeah, well, that's the harbor over there.
context: From document: 4320 Mariners Cove Dr 2.m4a — chunk 196 (chunk 196/225)
